'''竏嘛-th-r-g''' ('''kavathregoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wyte|wyte]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wyte|wyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘛-th-r-g
|-
! Lemma
| kavathregoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivathregoko|thivathregoko]] || [[word:jivathregoko|jivathregoko]] || [[word:shivathregoko|shivathregoko]] || [[word:kivathregoko|kivathregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvathregoko|thuthuvathregoko]] || [[word:jujuvathregoko|jujuvathregoko]] || [[word:shushuvathregoko|shushuvathregoko]] || [[word:kukuvathregoko|kukuvathregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvathregoko|thuvathregoko]] || [[word:juvathregoko|juvathregoko]] || [[word:shuvathregoko|shuvathregoko]] || [[word:kuvathregoko|kuvathregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvathregoko|thuvathregoko]] || [[word:juvathregoko|juvathregoko]] || [[word:shuvathregoko|shuvathregoko]] || [[word:kuvathregoko|kuvathregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevathregoko|thevathregoko]] || [[word:jevathregoko|jevathregoko]] || [[word:shevathregoko|shevathregoko]] || [[word:kevathregoko|kevathregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovathregoko|thothovathregoko]] || [[word:jojovathregoko|jojovathregoko]] || [[word:shoshovathregoko|shoshovathregoko]] || [[word:kokovathregoko|kokovathregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovathregoko|thovathregoko]] || [[word:jovathregoko|jovathregoko]] || [[word:shovathregoko|shovathregoko]] || [[word:kovathregoko|kovathregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovathregoko|thovathregoko]] || [[word:jovathregoko|jovathregoko]] || [[word:shovathregoko|shovathregoko]] || [[word:kovathregoko|kovathregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦvathregoko|thﾃｦvathregoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦvathregoko|jﾃｦvathregoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦvathregoko|shﾃｦvathregoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦvathregoko|kﾃｦvathregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavathregoko|thathavathregoko]] || [[word:jajavathregoko|jajavathregoko]] || [[word:shashavathregoko|shashavathregoko]] || [[word:kakavathregoko|kakavathregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavathregoko|thavathregoko]] || [[word:javathregoko|javathregoko]] || [[word:shavathregoko|shavathregoko]] || [[word:kavathregoko|kavathregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavathregoko|thavathregoko]] || [[word:javathregoko|javathregoko]] || [[word:shavathregoko|shavathregoko]] || [[word:kavathregoko|kavathregoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavathregithi|shavathregithi]] || [[word:shavathregiji|shavathregiji]] || [[word:shavathregishi|shavathregishi]] || [[word:shavathregiki|shavathregiki]]

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathregﾃｯf|shavathregﾃｯf]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
